summary: Iteration 178 testing complete: GPS Location-based Hotspots feature. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: /hotspots page loads with 'Energy Hotspots' header and 'Enable Location' button, Energy Hotspots link present in Explore nav menu, all existing routes (trade-circle, dashboard, refinement-lab) still working.
critical_code_review_comments: gps_hotspots.py properly implements 4 endpoints: /static-sites (no auth), /nearby, /collect, /history (all require auth)
Dynamic hotspots are deterministic per user+time-window (4h blocks) using SHA256 seed
Static sites include 8 sacred locations: Sedona, Stonehenge, Machu Picchu, Ganges, Fuji, Cenote Ik Kil, Uluru, Aurora
Reward tiers (common/uncommon/rare/legendary) with increasing dust, XP, and gem chance
Collection requires user to be within 300m of hotspot (haversine distance check)
2-hour cooldown per hotspot enforced via MongoDB collections tracking
GPSRadar.js component properly handles geolocation permission states and displays hotspot cards
Navigation.js correctly includes Energy Hotspots link under Explore dropdown with MapPin icon
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 178 GPS Hotspots feature fully working. Test user grad_test_522@test.com has collected some hotspots (on cooldown). Dynamic hotspots spawn within 2km of user position and refresh every 4 hours. Static sites are permanent landmarks at real-world locations. The /hotspots page shows 'Enable Location' prompt in Playwright since geolocation is not supported - this is expected behavior. All 4 backend endpoints tested: /api/hotspots/static-sites (8 sites), /api/hotspots/nearby (5 dynamic + filtered static), /api/hotspots/collect (rewards: dust, xp, optional gem), /api/hotspots/history (collection log).

backend_apis.GET /api/hotspots/static-sites: Returns 8 sacred sites with id, name, element, tier, lat, lng, lore, element_data (no auth required)
backend_apis.GET /api/hotspots/nearby: Returns 5 dynamic hotspots near user + static sites within radius (50km default). Each hotspot has name, element, tier, distance_m, bearing, in_range, on_cooldown, element_data
backend_apis.POST /api/hotspots/collect: Collects rewards from hotspot at user coordinates. Returns dust, xp, optional gem. Enforces 300m range and 2h cooldown
backend_apis.GET /api/hotspots/history: Returns total_collections count and history array with hotspot_id, hotspot_name, element, tier, dust, xp, gem, timestamp
backend_apis.authentication: All endpoints except /static-sites require auth, return 401/403 without token

frontend_hotspots_page.hotspot_cards: HotspotCard component with expand/collapse, element icons, tier styling, collect button

navigation.explore_menu: Energy Hotspots link added to Explore dropdown with MapPin icon
navigation.existing_routes: trade-circle, dashboard, refinement-lab all still working
